name: Broccoli with Cashews
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat the oven to 325°F.
2. Cook the broccoli in boiling water until tender and crisp.
3. Saute the onion in butter until softened.
4. Stir in the sour cream, sugar, vinegar, poppy seeds, salt, paprika, and remaining ingredients (except cashews) into the sauted onion mixture.
5. Layer the cooked broccoli in a buttered 1 1/2 quart baking dish.
6. Pour the sauce over the broccoli.
7. Sprinkle the cashews on top.
8. Bake uncovered for 25 minutes.
